hub.heroDescription: Connect with trusted timebanks, discover federated members, and share exchanges across partner communities.
hub.noPartnersDescription: Approved federation partners will appear here once your community connects.
hub.noActivityDescription: Cross-community messages, partnerships, and exchanges will appear here.

detail.title: Partner Community
detail.noDescription: This partner has not added a public description yet.

partners.title: Federation Partners
partners.subtitle: Browse connected timebanks and open their federation profiles.
partners.emptyDescription: Approved federation partners will appear here.

members.title: Federated Members
members.subtitle: Find members from partner communities and start cross-community conversations.
members.emptyDescription: Try another search or check back when more partners share their directories.
members.unavailableTitle: Federated member directory is not enabled
members.unavailableDescription: Federation is active for this tenant, but the cross-community profiles capability is disabled. A community administrator needs to enable federated profiles before members can be listed.

connections.title: Federation Connections
connections.subtitle: Manage members you are connected with across partner timebanks.

accepted.title: No connected members yet
accepted.description: Browse federated members and send connection requests.

pending_received.title: No requests waiting
pending_received.description: Incoming federation connection requests will appear here.

pending_sent.title: No sent requests
pending_sent.description: Requests you send to partner members will appear here.

connections.actionFailedDescription: Please check federation profiles are enabled and try again.

messages.title: Federated Messages
messages.subtitle: Review conversations with members from partner communities.
messages.emptyDescription: Messages with partner communities will appear here.
messages.unavailableDescription: Federation is active for this tenant, but cross-community messaging is disabled. A community administrator needs to enable federated messaging before conversations can be used.
messages.noRecipient: Choose a federated member before sending a message.
messages.subject: Subject
messages.sentDescription: Your message to {{name}} has been delivered.
messages.sendFailedDescription: Please check federation messaging is enabled and try again.

listings.title: Federated Listings
listings.subtitle: Browse offers and requests shared across trusted timebanks.
listings.emptyDescription: Shared partner listings will appear here.
listings.unavailableDescription: Federation is active for this tenant, but shared offers and requests are disabled. A community administrator needs to enable federated listings.
listings.noDescription: This shared listing does not have a description yet.

groups.title: Federated Groups
groups.subtitle: Discover shared community spaces from partner timebanks.
groups.emptyDescription: Partner groups will appear here when communities share them.
groups.unavailableDescription: Federation is active for this tenant, but partner groups are disabled. A community administrator needs to enable federated groups.
groups.noDescription: This shared group does not have a description yet.

events.title: Federated Events
events.subtitle: Discover partner workshops, socials, and online gatherings.
events.emptyDescription: Upcoming partner events will appear here.
events.unavailableDescription: Federation is active for this tenant, but partner events are disabled. A community administrator needs to enable federated events.
events.noDescription: This shared event does not have a description yet.

onboarding.title: Federation Setup
onboarding.subtitle: Choose what you share with partner communities and enable cross-timebank discovery.
onboarding.reviewDescription: Confirm what partner communities can see and how members can contact you.
onboarding.failedDescription: We could not save your federation setup. Please try again.

discover.title: Discover partner members
discover.description: Appear in federated search and find people across trusted timebanks.

message.title: Coordinate safely
message.description: Use cross-community messaging without leaving your own timebank account.

exchange.title: Share time-credit activity
exchange.description: Enable partner exchanges where your community allows them.

settings.title: Federation Settings
settings.subtitle: Control your profile visibility, messaging, and service reach across the network.
settings.statusDescription: These controls decide what partner communities can see and use.
settings.statusFailedDescription: Please check your connection and try again.

profile_visible_federated.label: Show my profile
profile_visible_federated.description: Let partner communities see your basic member profile.

appear_in_federated_search.label: Appear in search
appear_in_federated_search.description: Allow partner members to discover you in federated search.

show_skills_federated.label: Share skills
show_skills_federated.description: Include your listed skills in federation results.

show_location_federated.label: Share location
show_location_federated.description: Show your general location to partner communities.

show_reviews_federated.label: Share reviews
show_reviews_federated.description: Include reputation and reviews in federation trust signals.

messaging_enabled_federated.label: Allow federation messaging
messaging_enabled_federated.description: Let partner members send you cross-community messages.

transactions_enabled_federated.label: Allow federation exchanges
transactions_enabled_federated.description: Let partner members arrange time-credit exchanges with you.

email_notifications.label: Email notifications
email_notifications.description: Receive email updates for federation activity.
